name: Finnish Personal Identity Code (HETU)
description: Detects Finnish personal identity codes (henkilötunnus, HETU). Format: DDMMYY[+/-/A]NNNx where the century marker distinguishes 1800s (+), 1900s (-), and 2000s (A), followed by a 3-digit ordinal and a checksum character.

metadata.format: DDMMYY[+/-/A]NNNx — century marker + 3-digit ordinal + checksum char from 0-9A-FHJKLMNPRSTUVWXY
metadata.note: GDPR - personal data, Finnish Traficom regulation
